messages.content:
answer this multiple choice If you are looking for information about a certain subject on the Internet, what is the quickest way to get started?

Bulletin boardsSearch enginesAffiliate networksPortal websites
The quickest way to get started if you are looking for information about a certain subject on the Internet is to use search engines.

answer this multiple choice By default, how many worksheets are there in a new Microsoft Excel 2016 workbook?

One  , Two , Three  , Five
By default, there is one worksheet in a new Microsoft Excel 2016 workbook.

answer this multiple choice  How do you add programs from the Start menu to Taskbar's Quick Launch area in Windows 7?

Just drag and drop the program you want to add to the Quick Launch area on the Taskbar from the Start menu.       Right-click the program you want to add to the Quick Launch area on the Taskbar from the Start menu and select "Pin to Taskbar".     there is no method to add a program from the Start menu to the Quick Launch area on the Taskbar.      Both a and b.
Just drag and drop the program you want to add to the Quick Launch area on the Taskbar from the Start menu.

answer this multiple choice While entering data in an Excel 2016 worksheet, what happens if you press the tab key in a cell?

You will move to next column.  You will move to the first column.   You will move to the last column.   You will move to the previous column.
If you press the tab key in a cell while entering data in an Excel 2016 worksheet, you will move to the next column.

Which of the following functional keys is used for spelling and grammar check in a Microsoft Word 2016 document?

F2    F5    F7    F9
The functional key used for spelling and grammar check in a Microsoft Word 2016 document is F7.

answer this multiple choice  Which of the following is NOT an option when inserting a Cross-reference?

Numbered item.   SmartArt.    Heading.   Equation.  Table.
SmartArt is NOT an option when inserting a Cross-reference.

answer this multiple choice  Which level of junk e-mail protection available in Microsoft Outlook 2010 will you apply, if you want all such e-mails to be treated as junk whose senders are neither on your Safe Senders List nor on your Safe Recipients List?

No Automatic Filtering.    Low.    High.    Safe  Lists Only.

If you want all junk emails from senders not on your Safe Senders List or Safe Recipients List to be treated as junk in Microsoft Outlook 2010, you would apply the "High" level of junk email protection.

answer this multiple choice You customized the navigation pane with a lot of folders and shortcuts but now you want to remove all of them. What command line switch would you use with outlook.exe to remove the folders you added?

/profiles.      /resetfolders.     /resetnavpane.     /recycle.
To remove the folders and shortcuts you added to the navigation pane in Microsoft Outlook, you would use the "/resetnavpane" command line switch with outlook.exe.

answer this multiple choice  If I do not want the contents of one of my fields to automatically update, I would have to do which of the following?

Lock the field.     Protect the field.     Make the field hidden.    Turn field shading off
If you do not want the contents of one of your fields to automatically update, you would have to turn field shading off.

answer this multiple choice I   How would you assign a macro to a graphic?

On the Developer tab, in the Code group, click on Macros.       On the View tab, click on Macros and then click on Assign Macro on the shortcut menu. In the Macro name box, click on the macro that you want to assign.      On a worksheet, right-click on the graphic, then click on Assign Macro on the shortcut menu. In the Macro name box, click on the macro that you want to assign    .You can use any of the above three techniques.    You cannot assign a macro to a graphic.

To assign a macro to a graphic in Microsoft Excel, you can use the technique of right-clicking on the graphic on a worksheet, then clicking on "Assign Macro" on the shortcut menu. In the Macro name box, you can click on the macro that you want to assign.

answer this multiple choice   What is one thing the Compress Pictures feature does?

Changes all pictures from color to black and white.    Decreases the contrast of all pictures in the presentation.      Permanently deletes cropped areas of pictures.    Condenses the pictures to one area of the slide
One thing the Compress Pictures feature does is condense the pictures to reduce their file size on the slide or presentation.
